creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This would break POLA.  What if LD_LIBRARY_PATH were set to ~/Xlibs.aout ? 
You have a broken LD_LIBRARY_PATH -- or rather you are seeing why 
LD_LIBRARY_PATH is a really bad thing, and should *only* be used in the 
minimal absolutely necessary cases.
